"CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "**Component:** wasmd
**Criticality:** Low ([ACMv1](https://github.com/interchainio/security/blob/main/resources/CLASSIFICATION_MATRIX.md): I:Moderate; L:Unlikely)
**Patched versions:** wasmd 0.52.0

In multiple wasmd message types it was possible to add a large number of addresses which might lead to unexpected resource consumption in ValidateBasic.

See [CWA-2024-003](https://github.com/CosmWasm/advisories/blob/main/CWAs/CWA-2024-003.md) for more details.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m3rh-cvr5-x6q4", "github_reviewed_at": "2024-08-08T16:36:26Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m3rh-cvr5-x6q4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m3rh-cvr5-x6q4"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2024-08-08T16:36:26Z", "references": ["https://github.com/CosmWasm/wasmd/security/advisories/GHSA-m3rh-cvr5-x6q4", "https://github.com/CosmWasm/wasmd/commit/76c0c061c9cb6b142163883e46c26d99384dc443", "https://github.com/CosmWasm/advisories/blob/main/CWAs/CWA-2024-003.md", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m3rh-cvr5-x6q4"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/CosmWasm/wasmd/security-advisories/GHSA-m3rh-cvr5-x6q4", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/CosmWasm/wasmd", "summary": "CosmWasm wasmd has large address count in ValidateBasic", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T16:26:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m3rh-cvr5-x6q4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.52.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/CosmWasm/wasmd"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.52.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: CosmWasm wasmd has large address count in ValidateBasic
